title: Messing around with a Max Sharpe sector rotation model (Mid 2025 - Mid 2026 backtest)
author: Aromatic_Spinach8382
selftext: I’ve been experimenting with quantitative investing models and wanted to share a 1-year demo backtest that I found interesting. This isn’t a recommendation or a live portfolio—just a statistical exercise exploring how a pure Mean-Variance Optimization (Max Sharpe Ratio) framework behaves when left to make allocation decisions on its own.

comments.author: Born_Duck_1300
comments.body: Interesting exercise. Did you put any constraints on sector concentration or was it free to go all-in when the math favored it?

replies.author: Aromatic_Spinach8382
replies.body: No predefined weight for each sector, as long as they sum up to 100%, let the maths freely do their maths.
